nasb.text: Her father said, “I really thought that you hated her intensely; so I gave her to your companion. Is not her younger sister more beautiful than she? Please let her be yours instead.”

esv.text: And her father said, “I really thought that you utterly hated her, so I gave her to your companion. Is not her younger sister more beautiful than she? Please take her instead.”

cnv.text: 她父親說：“我以為你非常恨她，所以我把她給了你的一個同伴；她的妹妹不是比她更美麗嗎？你可以娶來代替她啊。”

ccb.text: 并对他说：“我以为你非常恨她，所以我把她改嫁给你的伴郎了。她妹子不是比她更美丽吗？你可以娶来代替她。”
